tasks.dockerfile:
FROM node:22-bookworm
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends bash ca-certificates python3 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
RUN npm install -g @openai/codex@latest
WORKDIR /app
RUN mkdir -p /app/task/tests
RUN cat <<'EOF' >/app/task/instruction.md
Create a file named result.txt in /app/task that contains exactly one line: tb-lite success
EOF
RUN cat <<'EOF' >/app/task/task.toml
version = "1.0"
[metadata]
suite = "tb_lite"
benchmark_name = "terminal_bench_lite"
task_name = "count_dataset_tokens"
EOF
RUN cat <<'EOF' >/app/task/tests/test.sh
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
cd /app/task
test -f result.txt
grep -Fxq "tb-lite success" result.txt
EOF
RUN chmod +x /app/task/tests/test.sh
RUN cat <<'EOF' >/app/run_codex_harbor_rollout.py
import argparse, base64, json, os, subprocess
from pathlib import Path

parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
parser.add_argument('--input', required=True)
parser.add_argument('--output', required=True)
args = parser.parse_args()
rollout = json.loads(Path(args.input).read_text())
task_root = Path('/app/task')
codex_home = task_root / '.codex'
codex_home.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
auth_b64 = str(rollout.get('codex_auth_json_b64') or '').strip()
openai_api_key = str(rollout.get('openai_api_key') or '').strip()
auth_source = str(rollout.get('codex_auth_source') or '').strip() or 'unknown'
if auth_b64:
    auth_json = base64.b64decode(auth_b64.encode('ascii'), validate=True).decode('utf-8')
    (codex_home / 'auth.json').write_text(auth_json, encoding='utf-8')
    os.environ.pop('OPENAI_API_KEY', None)
elif openai_api_key:
    (codex_home / 'auth.json').write_text(json.dumps({'OPENAI_API_KEY': openai_api_key}), encoding='utf-8')
    os.environ['OPENAI_API_KEY'] = openai_api_key
else:
    failure = {'success': False, 'trace_correlation_id': rollout.get('trace_correlation_id'), 'metrics': {'outcome_reward': 0.0}, 'score': 0.0, 'error': 'Codex auth is unavailable for this rollout.', 'metadata': {'deployment_name': rollout.get('deployment_name'), 'agent_name': 'codex', 'model_name': ((rollout.get('harbor_agent') or {}).get('model_name') or 'openai/gpt-5.4-mini')}}
    Path(args.output).write_text(json.dumps(failure, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
    raise SystemExit(1)
(codex_home / 'config.toml').write_text('approval_policy = "never"\n', encoding='utf-8')
agent = dict(rollout.get('harbor_agent') or {})
model_name = str(agent.get('model_name') or 'openai/gpt-5.4-mini').split('/', 1)[-1]
reasoning_effort = str((agent.get('kwargs') or {}).get('reasoning_effort') or 'medium')
instruction = (task_root / 'instruction.md').read_text(encoding='utf-8').strip()
env = os.environ.copy()
env['HOME'] = str(task_root)
env['CODEX_HOME'] = str(codex_home)
command = ['codex', 'exec', '--dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox', '--skip-git-repo-check', '--json', '--model', model_name, '-c', f'model_reasoning_effort={reasoning_effort}', '--', instruction]
codex_result = subprocess.run(command, cwd=task_root, env=env, capture_output=True, text=True, check=False)
verifier_result = subprocess.run(['bash', str(task_root / 'tests' / 'test.sh')], cwd=task_root, capture_output=True, text=True, check=False)
success = codex_result.returncode == 0 and verifier_result.returncode == 0
result = {'success': success, 'trace_correlation_id': rollout.get('trace_correlation_id'), 'metrics': {'outcome_reward': 1.0 if success else 0.0}, 'score': 1.0 if success else 0.0, 'error': None if success else (verifier_result.stderr.strip() or verifier_result.stdout.strip() or codex_result.stderr.strip() or codex_result.stdout.strip() or 'Harbor rollout failed'), 'metadata': {'deployment_name': rollout.get('deployment_name'), 'agent_name': 'codex', 'model_name': (agent.get('model_name') or 'openai/gpt-5.4-mini'), 'auth_source': auth_source, 'codex_returncode': codex_result.returncode, 'verifier_returncode': verifier_result.returncode}}
Path(args.output).write_text(json.dumps(result, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
raise SystemExit(0 if success else 1)
EOF
CMD ["sleep", "infinity"]
